/CAL:MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/EMMOD:DEFENDANTREMAINS ON HOME DETENTION BUT SHALL BE PERMITTED TO LEAVE HIS HOME IN SAN FRANCISCO ON 05-11-22 AND TRAVEL TO HIS AUNT'S HOME LOCATEDAT 3718 ARLINGTONCIRCLE, PITTSBURGH, CA 94565, WHERE HE SHALL CONTINUE ON HOME DETENTION, DEFENDANT MUST RETURN TO HIS HOME IN SAN FRANCISCO NO LATERTHAN 4:00 PM ON 05-12-22/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS NOT PERMITTED TO GO OUTSIDE HIS AUNT'S RESIDENCE OTHER THAN TO RETURN TO SAN FRANCISCO THE FOLLOWING DAY BY 4:00 PM/CONTD:COMPLIANCE STATUS/DOP/

/CAL: MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/DAWT/MO GRTD/EMMOD: DEFENDANTALLOWED TO WORK AS ON ONSITE MONITOR AT THE BAYVIEW FOUNDATION'S MOTHER BROWN LOCATED AT PIER 94 SITE F FROM 12:00AM TO 8:00AM/CONTD: PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT ON 03-03-22/X: FUTURE DATE 04-18-22 CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INVOFF:SGT, KEVIN WONG/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/X:SUBPONAED RECORDS ENVELOPES 2, 3, AND 4 RELEASED TO THE PEOPLE WITH STIPULATIONS,/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JANICE FROST/WIT SWORN DA:SGT, KEVIN WONG/WIT SWORN DA:SGT,THOMAS LEE/X:COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE FELONY COMPLAINTARREST WARRANT BEINGISSUED ON 8-2-21 AND DEFENDANT BEING ARRAIGNED ON 8-3-21,/HTA1: 1 AND 2/871D:3 AND 4/DEF:REMAINS ON ACM/DEF:ADMONISHED TO MAINTAIN CONTACT WITH ACM/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TN: SIVONTE JOEVON GIVENS/X: 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 10-04-21/987,2/X: NOTICEOF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN FILED/X: MOTION TO DETAIN DENIED/ /SAORD/SA1: AMANI G,F/SA2:GALILEO HIGH SCHOOL, 1150 FRANCISCO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, 94109/CTORD: TO SEAL EXHIBITS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS MONITOR AND SHALL BE ON PRE-TRIAL HOME DETENTION,  DEFENDANT MAY NOT LEAVE THEPREMISES EXCEPT FOR WORK TO YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSESS ANY WEAPONS OR FIREARMS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWF/
